main.name: Temmet, Naktamun's Will
main.oracle_text:
Vigilance, menace
Whenever you attack, draw a card, then discard a card.
Whenever you draw a card, Zombies you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.
main.flavor_text: Each time he glimpsed oblivion, he learned another lesson.

card_faces.name: Murderous Rider
card_faces.oracle_text:
Lifelink
When this creature dies, put it on the bottom of its owner's library.

card_faces.name: Swift End
card_faces.oracle_text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. You lose 2 life. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Gravecrawler
card.oracle_text:
This creature can't block.
You may cast this card from your graveyard as long as you control a Zombie.
card.flavor_text:
"Innistrad's ghoulcallers are talented enough, but let me show you what someone with real power can create."
—Liliana Vess

card.name: Lord of the Accursed
card.oracle_text:
Other Zombies you control get +1/+1.
{1}{B}, {T}: All Zombies gain menace until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: The Curse of Wandering leaves only hatred.

card.name: Corpse Knight
card.oracle_text: Whenever another creature you control enters, each opponent loses 1 life.
card.flavor_text:
"With each knight that rode out from the bone-white keep, the queen's soldiers felt their courage failing."
—Krinnea, *Siege of the Bone Spire*

card.name: Field of the Dead
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
Whenever this land or another land you control enters, if you control seven or more lands with different names, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Morphic Pool
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {U} or {B}.
card.flavor_text: Ancient magic reshapes the stage into a variety of landscapes.

card.name: Sea of Clouds
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.
card.flavor_text: Skybridges from across Kylem converge at the grand stadium of Valor's Reach.

card.name: Forgotten Creation
card.oracle_text:
Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.)
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may discard all the cards in your hand. If you do, draw that many cards.
card.flavor_text:
"My earliest work escapes me."
—Stitcher Geralf

card.name: Marsh Flats
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Plains or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Diregraf Captain
card.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
Other Zombie creatures you control get +1/+1.
Whenever another Zombie you control dies, target opponent loses 1 life.
card.flavor_text: Though its mind has long since rotted away, it wields a sword with deadly skill.

card.name: Mikaeus, the Unhallowed
card.oracle_text:
Intimidate (This creature can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or creatures that share a color with it.)
Whenever a Human deals damage to you, destroy it.
Other non-Human creatures you control get +1/+1 and have undying. (When a creature with undying dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Undead Warchief
card.oracle_text:
Zombie spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
Zombie creatures you control get +2/+1.
card.flavor_text: It has the strength of seven men. In fact, it used to be seven men.

card.name: Despark
card.oracle_text: Exile target permanent with mana value 4 or greater.
card.flavor_text: Liliana whispered to whatever consciousness Oketra and Bontu had left. "You are the gods. He is the usurper. You know what to do."

card.name: God-Eternal Oketra
card.oracle_text:
Double strike
Whenever you cast a creature spell, create a 4/4 black Zombie Warrior creature token with vigilance.
When God-Eternal Oketra dies or is put into exile from the battlefield, you may put it into its owner's library third from the top.

card.name: Wayward Servant
card.oracle_text: Whenever another Zombie you control enters, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
card.flavor_text: If one of the anointed fails to serve with perfect obedience, the desert is always ready to receive it.

card.name: Gray Merchant of Asphodel
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses X life, where X is your devotion to black. You gain life equal to the life lost this way. (Each {B} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to black.)

card.name: The Scarab God
card.oracle_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, each opponent loses X life and you scry X, where X is the number of Zombies you control.
{2}{U}{B}: Exile target creature card from a graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a 4/4 black Zombie.
When The Scarab God dies, return it to its owner's hand at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Reanimate
card.oracle_text: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.
card.flavor_text:
"You'd better be worth it."
—Liliana Vess

card.name: Flooded Strand
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Plains or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons once slept, their bones now rest.

card.name: Polluted Delta
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for an Island or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons once prevailed, their bones now sink.

card.name: Sidisi, Undead Vizier
card.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.)
When Sidisi exploits a creature, you may search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Death Baron
card.oracle_text: Skeletons you control and other Zombies you control get +1/+1 and have deathtouch. (Any amount of damage they deal to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
card.flavor_text: For the necromancer barons, killing and recruitment are one and the same.

card.name: Rooftop Storm
card.oracle_text: You may pay {0} rather than pay the mana cost for Zombie creature spells you cast.
card.flavor_text:
"Let those idiot priests tremble! A new era in unlife begins here and now. Oglor, raise the lightning vane!"
—Stitcher Geralf

card.name: Keep Watch
card.oracle_text: Draw a card for each attacking creature.
card.flavor_text: "I see their moral dilemmas. I see their raw courage. I see their self-sacrifice. I see our victory."

card.name: Vault of Champions
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Noxious Ghoul
card.oracle_text: Whenever this creature or another Zombie enters, all non-Zombie creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: Plague and death wrapped in one convenient package.

card.name: Shipwreck Marsh
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands.
{T}: Add {U} or {B}.
card.flavor_text: The bones of doomed ships jut out from the muck while the bones of their sailors molder below.

card.name: Diregraf Colossus
card.oracle_text:
This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each Zombie card in your graveyard.
Whenever you cast a Zombie spell, create a tapped 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Eternal Skylord
card.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, amass Zombies 2. (Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Zombie. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Zombie Army creature token first.)
Zombie tokens you control have flying.

card.name: Gleaming Overseer
card.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, amass Zombies 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Zombie. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Zombie Army creature token first.)
Zombie tokens you control have hexproof and menace.

card.name: Undead Augur
card.oracle_text: Whenever this creature or another Zombie you control dies, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.
card.flavor_text:
"To see past the veil of death, cross it."
—*The Red Book of Mezdrithalik*

({T}: Add {U} or {B}.)

{T}: Add {U}.
Channel — {3}{U}, Discard this card: Return target artifact, creature, enchantment, or planeswalker to its owner's hand. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each legendary creature you control.

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Black Market Connections
card.oracle_text:
At the beginning of your first main phase, choose one or more —
• Sell Contraband — Create a Treasure token. You lose 1 life.
• Buy Information — Draw a card. You lose 2 life.
• Hire a Mercenary — Create a 3/2 colorless Shapeshifter creature token with changeling. You lose 3 life. (It is every creature type.)

card.name: Varina, Lich Queen
card.oracle_text:
Whenever you attack with one or more Zombies, draw that many cards, then discard that many cards. You gain that much life.
{2}, Exile two cards from your graveyard: Create a tapped 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: All Necrons bear the mark of the Triarch, a brand upon their living-metal skin that binds them to their dynasty.

card.name: Reliquary Tower
card.oracle_text:
You have no maximum hand size.
{T}: Add {C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Let the others bicker over their little worlds and stars. I have an empire of knowledge, and it encompasses all others."
—Trazyn the Infinite

Indestructible

card.oracle_text:
As this land enters, choose a creature type.

{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell of the chosen type, and that spell can't be countered.

card.name: Urborg, Tomb of Yawgmoth
card.oracle_text: Each land is a Swamp in addition to its other land types.
card.flavor_text:
"All dead, all rotten. Elves and Men and Orcs. There was a great battle here long ago, yes."
—Gollum

card.name: Raise the Palisade
card.oracle_text: Choose a creature type. Return all creatures that aren't of the chosen type to their owners' hands.
card.flavor_text: She seemed tall beyond measurement, and beautiful beyond enduring, terrible and worshipful.

card.name: Sol Ring
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Model? I'm insulted. It's by all reasonable metrics a fully functional planetary system, scaled down for easier study."
—Urza, to Tawnos

card.name: Distant Melody
card.oracle_text: Choose a creature type. Draw a card for each permanent you control of that type.
card.flavor_text: Oona's song is like a twisted dinner chime. All the faeries return home, but it is Oona who feasts—on the stolen dreams and rumors they serve her.

card.name: Dreadhorde Invasion
card.oracle_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life and amass Zombies 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Zombie. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Zombie Army creature token first.)
Whenever a Zombie token you control with power 6 or greater attacks, it gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Frantic Search
card.oracle_text: Draw two cards, then discard two cards. Untap up to three lands.

card.name: Zombie Master
card.oracle_text:
Other Zombie creatures have swampwalk. (They can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Swamp.)
Other Zombies have "{B}: Regenerate this permanent."
card.flavor_text: Not even the cold embrace of death could keep him from his Prerelease events.

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text:
"New Vegas is more than a city—it's the remedy to mankind's derailment."

Ward {2}

This creature is the chosen type in addition to its other types.

{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {W} or {U}. This artifact deals 1 damage to you.

card.name: Teferi's Ageless Insight
card.oracle_text: If you would draw a card except the first one you draw in each of your draw steps, draw two cards instead.
card.flavor_text:
"Fine, you know more than me. But do you have to be such a show-off about it?"
—Chandra Nalaar, to Teferi

card.name: Exotic Orchard
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.
card.flavor_text: Orwell Orchards is about as peaceful and pleasant as a tomb can get.

card.name: Path to Exile
card.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: In the end, he marched into the desert sands, leaving the Vault behind him.

card.name: Talisman of Hierarchy
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}. This artifact deals 1 damage to you.
card.flavor_text: The ghouls of the FMS *Northern Star* seemed interested in moving up in the world of business.

card.name: Swords to Plowshares
card.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
card.flavor_text: "Tulips bring love into the world. I bring the tulips."

card_faces.name: Sink into Stupor
card_faces.oracle_text: Return target spell or nonland permanent an opponent controls to its owner's hand.

card_faces.oracle_text:
As this land enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card_faces.name: Fell the Profane

—Aryel, knight of Windgrace

card_faces.name: Fell Mire
card_faces.oracle_text:
As this land enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
{T}: Add {B}.

—Aryel, knight of Windgrace

{T}: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: With thistle, quill, twig, and beak, the finest artisans of each animalfolk society stitched unique quilts, patched together as a symbol of harmony.

{T}: Add {C}.

card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.

card.flavor_text:

Ward—Pay 2 life. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 2 life.)

card.oracle_text: Whenever a nontoken Zombie you control enters, create a token that's a copy of that creature.

"Geralf's prowess continues to grow. He can now replicate my own creations with near-perfect accuracy."
—Ludevic's laboratory notes

card.name: Hashaton, Scarab's Fist
card.oracle_text: Whenever you discard a creature card, you may pay {2}{U}. If you do, create a tapped token that's a copy of that card, except it's a 4/4 black Zombie.
card.flavor_text: "I served the Scarab in an age long past, in another form, under another name. No matter their visage, I serve."

card.oracle_text:
Creatures you control that are Zombies and/or tokens get +1/+1 and have flying.
